---
title: "Margaret Collier"
---

## Margaret Collier

### Description

contributor to <i>MP</i> (1890)

### Biography

This may be the Hon. Margaret Isabella Collier (d.1928), who married (1873) Count Arturo Galletti di Cadilhac, and was a prolific author during this period.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
